no_results.title: Alaa njeñtudi tawaandi e naamnal maa
no_results.subtitle: Min ndokki heen njeñtudi nanndundi e ndi les ɗoo
no_results.need_help: Aɗa yiɗi ballal? En njogii yimɓe dariiɓe.

ai_broadened_results_alert: Min kollitii njeñtudi ɓurndi yaajde sabu ɗaɓɓaande maa ina waawi jogaade ko ɓuri laaɓtude. Aɗa waawi laaɓtinde huutoraade toɓɓe walla miijooji.
ai_broadened_results_alert_low_info: Min kollitii njeñtudi ɓurndi yaajde sabu njiylawu maa ina waawi yiɗde laaɓtude. Aɗa waawi laaɓtinde huutoraade toɓɓe walla miijooji.
ai_broadened_results_alert_low_confidenc: Min kollitii njeñtudi ɓurndi yaajde sabu min ngonaano hoolaare e pottital ɓurngal moƴƴude. Aɗa waawi laaɓtinde huutoraade toɓɓe walla miijooji.
